scenario_b_consensus.model_type: XGBoost multi:softprob (38 features) + LLM + Risk Engine
scenario_b_consensus.outputs: NAICS probability + UK SIC + NACE + MCC + KYB

key_difference: Scenario A: ZoomInfo vs Equifax entity match confidence picks one NAICS winner. No probability. UK SIC from OC is available but DROPPED. No AML signals. Scenario B: All 6 source confidence scores become 38 features for XGBoost. Output: calibrated probability over all NAICS codes + UK SIC for GB companies + 9 AML/KYB signals + APPROVE/REVIEW/ESCALATE/REJECT.
